CustomField.description: Aging bucket for an unpaid, not-written-off installment based on days past due (1-30 / 31-60 / 61-90 / 90+); "Not Overdue" otherwise. Evaluated live (TODAY). Group pledge aging reports by this field. Added for JSI-82. Author: Jason Ott.
CustomField.formula: IF(OR(npe01__Paid__c, npe01__Written_Off__c, ISBLANK(npe01__Scheduled_Date__c), npe01__Scheduled_Date__c >= TODAY()), "Not Overdue", IF(TODAY() - npe01__Scheduled_Date__c <= 30, "1-30 Days", IF(TODAY() - npe01__Scheduled_Date__c <= 60, "31-60 Days", IF(TODAY() - npe01__Scheduled_Date__c <= 90, "61-90 Days", "90+ Days"))))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Days-past-due aging bucket for this unpaid installment.
CustomField.label: Aging Bucket
